nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Email
nodes.notes: Receives incoming emails/form submissions. Connect your email provider or contact form here.

nodes.name: Route by Category
nodes.notes: Routes emails to different response templates based on classification

nodes.name: Generate AI Response
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the response templates for each category with client-specific info

nodes.name: Send Auto-Reply
nodes.notes: Configure with client's SMTP settings (Gmail, Outlook, SendGrid, etc.)

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs every email + response to a Google Sheet for the client's dashboard

meta.templateNotes: AI Email Auto-Responder. Classifies incoming emails and sends tailored responses. Edit 'Generate AI Response' node with client-specific templates.
